title: Argentinian Beef Stir-Fry
description: A halal-friendly, post-workout stir-fry dish from Argentina, made with tender beef, colorful vegetables and a hint of Worcestershire sauce.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the beef to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until browned.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced onion to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the sliced red bell pepper and zucchini to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until tender.
Add the Worcestershire sauce, red chili flakes, salt and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetables and sauce.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the beef is cooked to your liking.
Serve the beef stir-fry hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro.
